rationale: Etingof yields 24 self-contained, judgeable, non-answer-leaking problems after manual curation. Haiku-tagged judgement was unreliable (hallucinated technique tags from chapter context, marked 'Check this' problems as self-contained). Manual curation at this scale is faster than another tagger round.
stratification: Each trace contributes a distinct technique. Each eval problem has at least one trace with a related technique (positive-control match). Diversity goal: cover asymptotic integrals, Feynman calculus, matrix integrals, group theory, perturbative QFT, CFT, ODE theory, geometry — 12 distinct technique buckets.

trace_set_revisions.iter3: Dropped ex_13_4 (CFT theta) and ex_5_19 (hyperbolic triangle); swapped ex_5_19 to eval set after discovering that ex_13_12 references undefined Ln operators and is unusable as eval. New trace target: 11 (6 done + 5 pending). The CFT pair (ex_13_4 trace + ex_13_12 eval) is dropped since the eval is unusable; ex_5_18 trace is now matched by TWO eval problems (ex_5_17, ex_5_19), giving a doubled signal on group/Euler-char technique transfer.
